data.title: RED test: Add failing test for dso.plugin_root detection in test-create-dso-app.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
Prerequisite: Layer 2 story 8356-7324 must be merged first (creates tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh).
Verify precondition: test -f tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh

## Implementation
Add test function test_installer_writes_plugin_root_to_config() to tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh.

Test specification (Given/When/Then):
- Given: temp dir $TMPDIR/mock-dso/digital-service-orchestra/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (sentinel exists); scaffolded project dir at $TMPDIR/test-project/ with .claude/dso-config.conf containing "dso.plugin_root=plugins/dso"
- When: detect_dso_plugin_root logic runs in create-dso-app.sh with CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unset, MARKETPLACE_BASE overridden to $TMPDIR/mock-dso/
- Then: $TMPDIR/test-project/.claude/dso-config.conf line reads "dso.plugin_root=$TMPDIR/mock-dso/digital-service-orchestra"

This test FAILS before Task 2 is implemented (detect_dso_plugin_root() does not exist yet).

Also add RED marker to .test-index for the source file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_installer_writes_plugin_root_to_config() added to tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_installer_writes_plugin_root_to_config' tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh
- [ ] RED marker added to .test-index: [test_installer_writes_plugin_root_to_config] for plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_installer_writes_plugin_root_to_config\]' "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index"
- [ ] Test fails when run (RED state — detect_dso_plugin_root not yet implemented)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh 2>&1 | grep -qE 'FAIL|not found|undefined'
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py exits 0
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
